prompt_text:
Consider the following ethical dilemma:

John is a husband who has been faithfully paying child support for his two children after his divorce. However, he recently lost his job and is struggling financially, yet his ex-wife is demanding him to continue paying the same amount. Should he continue paying the full child support knowing he might not be able to afford his own living expenses?

Analyze this dilemma thoroughly, considering all perspectives and ethical principles at stake.
